options.name: -add_ignore_pins
options.description: ignore pins to add to the skew group

options.name: -add_sinks
options.description: sink pins to add to the skew group

options.name: -make_exclusive
options.description: set the exclusive_sinks_rank of the current skew group to be the highest one

options.name: -remove_ignore_pins
options.description: ignore pins to remove from the skew group

options.name: -remove_sinks
options.description: sink pins to remove from the skew group

options.name: -skew_group
options.description: user-defined identifier for the skew group to be modified
